title: NCRTC Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
post_name: Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications
short_info: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: 62 Years Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: 40 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/ 03 years Diploma in Engineering Or MBA, M.A, P.G.D.M
qualification.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: Degree/ 03 years Diploma in Engineering in ECE/ Electrical/ Electronics with a minimum of 20 years of experience. Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: Full Time-M.B.A./ P.G.D.M. in Marketing or equivalent and Full Time -M.A./ P.G. in Mass Communication or equivalent

salary_details.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: 75,200/- p.m Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: 50000-160000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
